summary.en: For any wireless device that may be permitted under applicable sanctions exemptions, the Ministry of Information Industry (MIC — 정보산업성) is the DPRK authority responsible for telecom and radio equipment type approval. MIC administers spectrum allocation and radio device licensing for the Kwangmyong intranet and limited authorised commercial networks. Type approval documentation and test reports must be submitted to MIC prior to import. No public online submission portal exists; all engagement is through official government-to-government or authorised intermediary channels only.
summary.zh: 对于在适用制裁豁免下可能被允许的无线设备，信息产业省（MIC——정보산업성）是负责电信和无线电设备型号核准的DPRK主管机构。MIC负责光明网内联网及有限授权商业网络的频谱分配和无线电设备许可。型号核准文件和测试报告须在进口前提交至MIC。目前不存在公开在线提交门户；所有事务均须通过官方政府间渠道或经授权的中间机构办理。
summary.zht: 對於在適用制裁豁免下可能被允許的無線設備，信息產業省（MIC——정보산업성）是負責電信和無線電設備型號核准的DPRK主管機構。MIC負責光明網內聯網及有限授權商業網絡的頻譜分配和無線電設備許可。型號核准文件和測試報告須在進口前提交至MIC。目前不存在公開在線提交門戶；所有事務均須通過官方政府間渠道或經授權的中間機構辦理。

standards_or_laws: DPRK Telecommunications Law (전기통신법) — provisions on radio equipment licensing
MIC (Ministry of Information Industry — 정보산업성) administrative regulations
UN UNSCR 1718 (2006), UNSCR 2270 (2016), UNSCR 2371 (2017) — sanctions framework

summary.en: China requires SRRC (State Radio Regulation of China) type approval under MIIT administration for radio frequency equipment, plus MIIT Network Access Licence (NAL) for telecom terminal equipment. CCC certification under GB radio standards applies for consumer wireless products.
summary.zh: 中国要求无线电频率设备须在工业和信息化部（MIIT）管理下取得国家无线电管理委员会（SRRC）型号核准，电信终端设备还须取得MIIT网络接入许可证（NAL）。消费类无线产品还需按照GB无线电标准取得强制性产品认证（CCC）。
summary.zht: 中國要求無線電頻率設備須在工業和信息化部（MIIT）管理下取得國家無線電管理委員會（SRRC）型號核准，電信終端設備還須取得MIIT網路接入許可證（NAL）。消費類無線產品還需按照GB無線電標準取得強制性產品認證（CCC）。

standards_or_laws: MIIT Order No. 14 (2016) — Radio Frequency Equipment Type Approval
GB 15629.11 (Wi-Fi), GB/T 15629.15 (Bluetooth), related GB radio standards
CCC certification under China Compulsory Certification catalogue

gap.en: Chinese SRRC, MIIT NAL, and CCC approvals have no recognition in the DPRK. MIC type approval is a completely separate process requiring engagement through official channels. Critically, most wireless device exports are prohibited under UN sanctions before domestic DPRK regulatory requirements become relevant.
gap.zh: 中国SRRC、MIIT NAL及CCC核准在DPRK不具备任何认可效力。MIC型号核准是完全独立的程序，须通过官方渠道办理。关键在于，在DPRK国内监管要求产生关联之前，大多数无线设备出口已被联合国制裁所禁止。
gap.zht: 中國SRRC、MIIT NAL及CCC核准在DPRK不具備任何認可效力。MIC型號核准是完全獨立的程序，須通過官方渠道辦理。關鍵在於，在DPRK國內監管要求產生關聯之前，大多數無線設備出口已被聯合國制裁所禁止。

mandatory_status.target: Required for any permitted device (sanctions authorisation required first)

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Chinese SRRC/CCC/NAL approvals are not recognised in North Korea. MIC type approval would be required for any wireless device lawfully permitted under sanctions exemptions. However, comprehensive UN Security Council sanctions (UNSCR 1718 and subsequent resolutions) and national sanctions programmes (US OFAC, EU, UK) prohibit or severely restrict most wireless device exports to the DPRK. Exporters must obtain explicit written legal clearance from qualified sanctions counsel before initiating any transaction. This row is provided for compliance awareness only.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 中国SRRC/CCC/NAL核准在朝鲜不被认可。对于在制裁豁免下合法获准的任何无线设备，均须取得MIC型号核准。但是，联合国安理会全面制裁（UNSCR 1718及后续决议）以及国家制裁方案（美国OFAC、欧盟、英国）禁止或严格限制大多数无线设备向DPRK出口。出口商在启动任何交易前，必须从具备资质的制裁法律顾问处获得明确的书面法律许可。本条目仅供合规意识参考。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 中國SRRC/CCC/NAL核准在北韓不被認可。對於在制裁豁免下合法獲准的任何無線設備，均須取得MIC型號核准。但是，聯合國安理會全面制裁（UNSCR 1718及後續決議）以及國家制裁方案（美國OFAC、歐盟、英國）禁止或嚴格限制大多數無線設備向DPRK出口。出口商在啟動任何交易前，必須從具備資質的制裁法律顧問處獲得明確的書面法律許可。本條目僅供合規意識參考。
